Threshold.overline: · Members Only · Est. MMXXVI · By Invitation or Oath ·
Threshold.title: Where
Threshold.lead: Drake's Bounty is the first affiliate network in gambling, trading and crypto governed by a public code of standards — binding on operators and creators alike. Read it. Sign it. Or don't cross the threshold.
Threshold.founderNoteBody: grew tired of watching creators get shaved by operators who wouldn't explain themselves, and operators take traffic from affiliates they couldn't verify. So I built a place with rules — {highlight}, binding on everyone who enters. If you can live by it, you're home. If you can't, the road is long.
Threshold.chooseTitle: Choose your side of the Code
Threshold.chooseSubtitle: Same network. Same standards. Different oath.
Threshold.creatorDesc: You bring the audience. We make sure you get paid — fast, clean, in full.
Threshold.operatorDesc: You fund the bounties. We deliver verified traffic from creators bound by The Code.
Threshold.closingQuote: "The Code is not a cage. It is a threshold."

Oath.codeIntro: By sealing this oath, you commit to the five articles below.
Oath.creatorArticle1: Human traffic only. No bots, no click farms, no misrepresented sources.
Oath.creatorArticle2: Honest disclosure. What I recommend, I recommend as mine.
Oath.creatorArticle3: No audience deception. I will not fabricate results or outcomes I know to be false.
Oath.creatorArticle4: Responsible promotion. I respect age, geo, and self-exclusion restrictions.
Oath.creatorArticle5: One identity. One creator. Multi-accounting to manipulate tiers is a violation.
Oath.operatorArticle1: Transparent attribution. I provide full, real-time visibility on clicks, registrations, and revenue.
Oath.operatorArticle2: No unjustified shaving. Reclassifications above 3% are documented and auditable.
Oath.operatorArticle3: Timely settlement. I honor the agreed payment cadence without hidden delays.
Oath.operatorArticle4: No retroactive term changes. Past terms are sealed.
Oath.operatorArticle5: I commit to Drake's Bounty's quarterly audit and accept the public Standards Index rating.
Oath.signCheckbox: If I can't live by this, I don't belong here.
Oath.sealedQuote: "The job is the job. Do it right, and the road runs with you."
